name: The Power Rangers of Angel Grove (MMPR)
description:
A RPG where a mysterious new Ranger complete with a Power Coin that Zordon doesn't even know about has arrived in Angel Grove and the Rangers are curious about their true identity and intentions even as they are being defeated by Rita's new super Putty Patrollers.

POV where you are friends with the Power Rangers but they have no idea that you found a lost Power Coin and know that they are the Power Rangers. Requested by @Dragon_baller20 with my own personal touches but mostly still their original idea.

Continues with the PR tradition of having cool extra Rangers that are stronger then the base team, even including Tommy. SPD may still be my favorite Power Rangers series with it's great (and underused) Kat Ranger, Omega Ranger and Shadow Ranger as extra Rangers but i'd be lying if i didn't say that MMPR was my first PR series and what got me into Power Rangers. That theme still slaps and i hope the next time MM actually gets a movie adaptation(i heard a few random rumors about a new movie stuck in limbo), it'll do the fans some good.
creator: HereFor@TfGuy
